## 🏷️ Type

- [ ] ✨ `feat:` New feature
- [ ] 🐛 `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] ♻️ `refactor:` Code improvement
- [ ] 📚 `docs:` Documentation
- [ ] 💅 `style:` Style/formatting
- [ ] 🧪 `test:` Tests
- [ ] ⚙️ `chore:` Build/dependencies
- [ ] 🚀 `perf:` Performance improvement

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Tests pass for impacted features
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if any)
